name: Khaleel Zindel Clark
citizenship: U.S. Citizen – Eligible for Security Clearance

items.title: Valencia College
bullets: **Bachelor of Applied Science in Computing Technology & Software Development**

items.title: Hilton Grand Vacations
bullets: Managed hotel reservations, membership programs, and payment transactions simultaneously across Salesforce and AS400 in a high-volume remote environment.
Executed secure financial transactions including loan payments, club assessments, and rental agreements with accuracy and strict attention to compliance.
Resolved member issues through structured troubleshooting and cross-functional coordination with membership support and portfolio services teams.
Provided phone-based member support, educating users on program functionality and resolving inquiries across membership and account workflows.
Maintained accuracy across financial and account-related processes while managing high transaction volumes under time pressure.

items.title: CrowdStreet
items.position: Investor Relations Specialist - Product & Systems Support
bullets: Provided Tier 2 support for enterprise investor management systems, troubleshooting account access, MFA resets, and system-related issues.
Triaged and resolved 50+ daily investor inquiries within SLA targets, escalating complex issues to product and engineering teams.
Conducted direct 1-on-1 investor sessions via phone and Zoom, providing personalized support on account setup, troubleshooting, and general platform questions.
Managed complex investor account workflows including account setup, ownership transfers, and commercial real estate transaction support across the platform.
Analyzed trends in user-reported issues to identify workflow inefficiencies and recommend product or process improvements.
Translated user pain points into actionable insights for technical teams, bridging the gap between investor experience and platform reliability.
Created structured documentation and onboarding materials to improve support consistency and reduce user confusion.

items.title: LPT Realty
bullets: Provided technical support across platforms, troubleshooting and resolving agent issues with system access, configuration, and integrations.
Conducted weekly virtual orientation sessions for new agents, ensuring smooth onboarding and team integration.
Onboarded and trained non-technical users on systems and workflows, improving adoption and reducing operational errors.
Identified recurring issues and contributed to process improvements through documentation and user guidance.

items.title: AdventHealth
bullets: Managed end-to-end referral workflows within enterprise healthcare systems, ensuring accurate documentation and compliance.
Coordinated with physicians, insurance providers, and internal departments to resolve operational bottlenecks.
Maintained data accuracy across systems and identified inconsistencies impacting patient processing timelines.
Operated within strict regulatory and compliance standards in a HIPAA-aligned environment.

items.title: Novus Guild Website
items.sub_title: ASP.NET Core, React, TypeScript, SQL Server, RabbitMQ, Authentik, MUI, MUI DataGrid, rsbuild, Docker Compose
bullets: Eliminated a fully manual workflow, saving the guild 120+ hours of administrative labor annually through end-to-end automation.
Gathered and translated business requirements into structured system workflows across dashboards, user management, and administrative tooling.
Designed and implemented responsive React interfaces: dashboards, leaderboards, profiles, and admin tooling, built from reusable components with React hooks managing shared application state.
Implemented role-based access and authentication workflows to ensure secure and controlled system usage.
Managed development iteratively, prioritizing features based on active user feedback and community needs.

Architected and launched an open-source guild management platform with 52 active users and growing, currently being adopted by external guilds, demonstrating real-world product viability and community traction beyond the original use case.
Structured the .NET backend using a DTO and service layer pattern, separating data contracts from business logic to support clean API design and long-term maintainability.
Designed and implemented a parameterized leaderboard API supporting date-range filtering across multiple entity types enabling flexible, data-driven reporting from a single backend.

items.title: Job Search Intelligence Platform
items.sub_title: MCP, React, TypeScript, Prisma, OAuth, Next.js, Zod, monorepo architecture
bullets: Designed a structured Prisma schema tracking the full job-search lifecycle: applications, interviews, follow-ups, emails, events, and reflections — as a local-first SQLite database with no external data exposure.
Built a master skills inventory system with canonical skill tracking and resume-skill linking, enabling structured comparison between tailored resumes and a single source-of-truth skills record.
Structured the codebase as a pnpm workspaces monorepo with three packages: web app, MCP server, and shared types, enforcing clean separation between UI, API, and validation layers.
Defined shared Zod schemas in a dedicated package consumed across both the web app and MCP server, ensuring type-safe validation at every system boundary without duplication.

Exposed read-only MCP tool endpoints covering: applications, interviews, reflections, email logs, follow-ups, resumes, and skills with bearer token protection and SSE transport as a structured API surface for AI agent consumption.
Integrated a local LLM worker via LM Studio using an OpenAI-compatible interface, enabling AI-assisted workflows without sending sensitive job-search data to external APIs.

Designed the system around explicit AI boundaries: the local LLM worker is restricted to generating UI output only, the MCP server is strictly read-only, and all reasoning and decisions flow through the user, reflecting deliberate thinking about safe, auditable AI system design.

Implemented MCP-integrated resume generation tools allowing GPT to retrieve a master resume JSON, apply role-specific tailoring, and render a formatted PDF via headless Chromium, fully automating a previously manual process.
Implemented automated SQLite backup with scheduled pruning of backups older than 30 days, ensuring data durability without manual maintenance overhead.

items.title: Airport Operations Analytics Dashboard
items.sub_title: Python, SQLite, Pandas, Streamlit, Plotly, FAA / ADSB.lol / AirLabs APIs
bullets: Designed KPI logic to analyze operational disruption patterns and performance trends.

Integrated three independent live data sources: FAA (airspace restrictions), ADSB.lol (real-time traffic snapshots), and AirLabs (airline delays, cancellations, and diversions) into a unified SQLite data model for cross-source analysis.
Wrote an automated test suite using pytest covering data parsing and scoring logic, enabling safe iteration on collection and analysis code without manual validation.
Deployed a cron-based automated collection pipeline running every 10 minutes, using flock to prevent overlapping runs and shell script wrappers to ensure consistent execution in production.
Framed the project around a testable analytical question (whether MCO underperforms DEN when normalized for traffic volume) and built the dashboard KPIs and visualizations to directly answer it.
Implemented custom API throttling logic with persistent state tracking to respect rate limits across collection windows, preventing quota exhaustion without sacrificing data freshness.

Designed and deployed the full application on a self-hosted Linux environment, configuring process management, scheduled collection, and a reverse-proxy-ready server architecture for production reliability.

Authored comprehensive technical documentation covering the full deployment lifecycle — runtime model, environment configuration, database initialization, cron setup, and a structured operational troubleshooting guide.

items.title: Portfolio Website
bullets: Designed and developed a responsive portfolio with an emphasis on visual hierarchy, layout consistency, and user experience.
Created reusable UI components and flexible page layouts to enable efficient iteration and future content updates.
